MODULE: cosmos.integration.ue5.translator
FILE: cosmos/integration/ue5/translator.py (137 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: UE5 Natural Language to Python Translator.

CLASSES:
- UE5Command: Translated UE5 command.
- UE5CommandTranslator: Translate natural language to UE5 Python API calls.

Uses pattern matching for c
  Methods: def translate(self, natural_command: str) -> UE5Command
  Methods: async def translate_async(self, natural_command: str) -> UE5Command
